name: @dromio/workflow-canvas-protocol
description: Coordinate-free Dromio workflow render contracts and deterministic renderer-local layout.

scripts.build: (cd ../../protocols && bun run build) && node ../../../node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.json && bun build src/index.ts --target=node --format=cjs --outfile dist/index.cjs
scripts.check: (cd ../../protocols && bun run build) && node ../../../node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun test
